provenance.method: Policy extraction from cached source artifact using rules: threshold='Plan 1 student loan.*?£([0-9,]+) a year', repayment_rate='pay\s*([0-9]+)%\s*of\s*your\s*income\s*over\s*the\s*lowest\s*threshold', write_off='Plan 1 loans get written off.*?on or after 1 September 2006.*?written off\s*([0-9]+)\s*years', interest_rate='Plan 1 interest-rate table: latest period '1 Sep 2024 to 31 Aug 2025', extracted rate column'.

Policy extraction from cached source artifact using rules: threshold='Plan 2 student loan.*?£([0-9,]+) a year', repayment_rate='pay\s*([0-9]+)%\s*of\s*your\s*income\s*over\s*the\s*lowest\s*threshold', write_off='Plan 2 loans are written off\s*([0-9]+)\s*years', interest_rate='Plan 2 max-interest table: latest period '1 Sep 2024 to 31 Aug 2025', extracted rate column'.

Policy extraction from cached source artifact using rules: threshold='Plan 5 student loan.*?£([0-9,]+) a year', repayment_rate='pay\s*([0-9]+)%\s*of\s*your\s*income\s*over\s*the\s*lowest\s*threshold', write_off='Plan 5 loans are written off\s*([0-9]+)\s*years', interest_rate='Plan 5 proxy set equal to extracted Plan 2 latest max rate rule (Plan 2 max-interest table: latest period '1 Sep 2024 to 31 Aug 2025', extracted rate column)'.

provenance.assumption_basis: Representative salary bands for scenario analysis informed by borrower distribution context in official release.
Scenario assumption for nominal annual salary progression anchored to ONS income trend context.

Counterfactual benchmark definition; threshold is auto-set from extracted Plan 5 repayment threshold and rate auto-set from extracted statutory repayment rate; working years remains a scenario assumption.

provenance.method: Programmatically extracted from GOV.UK repayment-policy page during provenance build.
Programmatically extracted latest Plan 1 and Plan 2 interest-rate rows from GOV.UK policy-statistics page.

provenance.assumption_basis: Plan 5 borrower repayment cohort begins in 2026; model proxies Plan 5 effective interest rate to the latest published Plan 2 maximum rate pending direct observed series.
Plan-level debt simplifications used for deterministic simulation; benchmarked against official SLC/GOV.UK publications.
